# hot — focused context for the byte-range off-by-one

> Load this first. The failing spec localizes the defect via the graph;
> read ONLY the named module below — not the whole package.

## Symptom
`parse_byte_range("bytes=0-499", 1000)` returns content-length **499**, but HTTP ranges are inclusive (RFC 9110 §14.1.2) → must be **500**.

## Graph localization (read first)
Failing test `tests.test_range` →(`tested_by`)→ **`httprange.parser`** — the one module to open (273 tok), not the whole package (560 tok).

## Suspect
`httprange.parser.parse_byte_range` — the content-length computation.
